issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Create lean canvas for new AI code review tool
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the explicit 9-box structure with existing alternatives, early adopter, the [End result] for [target customer] without [pain/cost] UVP format, and identifies the riskiest assumption with a concrete test; baseline lists generic blocks without these skill-specific patterns.

scenarios.name: Review existing canvas and find riskiest assumptions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment applies the 'riskiest assumption first' discipline, flags fake Unfair Advantage, recommends weekly cadence and one-canvas-per-segment, and proposes pricing/interview experiments grounded in the skill's guidelines; baseline gives generic CRO advice.
